name: albizia julibrissin
mechanism: Rich in flavonoids, lignan glycosides and saponins; bioactive constituents such as quercitrin and julibroside C1 show antidepressant and anxiolytic effects by modulating monoamine neurotransmission, the HPA axis and GABA and 5-HT1A receptors【769566324375905†L437-L447】【769566324375905†L486-L506】.
